narrative:
Precinct Mississinawa Township (precinct in Darke County) has 465 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
